svg.text: PK / PD engine - what the code computes
Clearance (patient-specific)
kel_eff = kel_catalog * [ hep_w*metabolicClearance + ren_w*renalClearance ]
* (0.7 + 0.3*hemodynamicReserve)
IV bolus: C(t) = (D/Vd)*exp(-kel_eff*t_min)
Non-IV: ka absorption (two exponentials). Infusion: analytic segments for dC/dt = R/Vd - kel*C.
Concentration aggregation
For each drug id at simulation time T:
C_total = sum(bolus contributions) + infusion segments
Vd = Vd_L_per_kg * weightKg. Only doses with simSeconds <= T count.
Pharmacodynamics (per catalog effect)
effect = Emax * C / (EC50 + C)
Multiply by adrenergicReserve or baroreceptorSensitivity when modulatedBy applies.
Antagonist: scale target deltas by max(0, 1 - min(1, C_ant/EC50_ant)).
Sum dHR, dSBP, dDBP, dRR, dSpO2 into VitalDeltas.
Merge into displayed vitals
mergeVitalsForDisplay(AI_baseline, PK_deltas + autonomic_deltas)
Numeric HR/BP/RR/SpO2: add deltas and clamp. Non-numeric HR (e.g. arrest rhythm text) unchanged.
Wired meds: epi, atropine, adenosine, amiodarone, lidocaine, dopamine infusion,
nitroglycerin, fentanyl, midazolam, ketamine, naloxone, albuterol, dextrose IV,
glucagon IM; protocol MED_* ids alias into the same catalog.
src/lib/physiology/pk-engine.ts
